items.br: Define templates de checklists com acoes, contatos e perfis de elegibilidade. Base para padronizacao de processos de onboarding, offboarding e transicoes.
items.en: Defines checklist templates with actions, contacts, and eligibility profiles. Basis for standardization of onboarding, offboarding, and transition processes.
items.es: Define templates de checklists con acciones, contactos y perfiles de elegibilidad. Base para estandarización de procesos de onboarding, offboarding y transiciones.
